elements.name: 1 - The CLI reports its version

steps.name: the user asks for the version
a version string is returned

elements.name: 2 - The CLI lists all supported engines

steps.name: the user lists available engines
all supported engines are listed

elements.name: 3 - System inspection detects the GPU and driver

steps.name: a machine with an AMD GPU
the user inspects the system
the inspection reports which GPU is installed
the inspection reports that the driver is available

elements.name: 4 - System inspection distinguishes CLI-managed from pre-existing ROCm

steps.name: a machine with a ROCm install that was not set up by the CLI
the user inspects the system
the inspection reports the install as pre-existing
the inspection suggests setting up a CLI-managed install

elements.name: 3 - A running model server is discoverable by name

the user lists running services

elements.name: 1 - Installing the SDK makes it the active runtime

steps.name: a machine with no CLI-managed runtimes
the user installs the SDK
a runtime is registered
the runtime is set as active
the runtime includes an inference engine

steps.name: a machine with a standard ROCm install
the user tries to adopt the existing install
the adoption is refused
the error explains which install types can be adopted
